title: Artificial Grass in Gurgaon & Delhi NCR | Balcony, Terrace & Garden Grass Price | Goals Floors
shortDescription: Buy premium artificial grass in Gurgaon and Delhi NCR for balconies, terrace gardens, offices, schools, and landscaping projects. Waterproof, UV-protected, pet-friendly, and available in 25mm to 50mm thickness.
longDescription:
Goals Floors provides premium artificial grass in Gurgaon, Delhi, Noida, and across NCR for residential and commercial projects. Our artificial grass is designed for balconies, terrace gardens, office spaces, schools, cafes, and landscaping areas.

Unlike natural grass, artificial grass requires zero watering, zero maintenance, and stays green throughout the year. It is 100% waterproof, UV-protected, pet-friendly, and ideal for Indian weather conditions including heavy rain and harsh summer heat.

We offer multiple thickness options including 25mm, 35mm, 40mm, and luxury 50mm artificial grass depending on your budget and project type.

Our artificial grass is widely used for:
- Balcony grass installation
- Terrace garden flooring
- Outdoor landscaping
- Backyard grass
- Rooftop cafes
- Indoor decorative grass walls

Whether you need artificial grass for a small balcony or a large commercial landscaping project in Gurgaon, Goals Floors provides high-quality grass rolls at wholesale prices with fast delivery across Delhi NCR.

features.title: Advanced UV Stabilization Technology
features.description: Engineered with a protective, high-grade UV coating that prevents the grass yarn from fading, discoloration, or becoming brittle even under harsh, direct Indian sunlight.

features.title: Hyper-Realistic 4-Tone Micro-Yarn
features.description: Expertly crafted combining emerald green, olive green, and a brown curled thatch layer to perfectly mimic the exact look, texture, and bounce of a natural, healthy lawn.

features.title: Max-Drain High-Flow System
features.description: The robust double-layered polyurethane backing features precision-punched drainage holes, ensuring heavy rainwater washes away instantly without pooling or causing dampness.

features.title: 100% Pet & Child Safe Materials
features.description: Manufactured from non-toxic, lead-free, and hypoallergenic polyethylene. It provides a soft, safe play area for kids and is exceptionally easy to clean and sanitize after pets.

features.title: Zero Maintenance & Eco-Friendly
features.description: Eliminate the need for harmful pesticides, fertilizers, and daily watering. Conserve water and save thousands of rupees annually on maintenance while enjoying a pristine lawn all year round.

features.title: Heavy-Duty Commercial Durability
features.description: Boasting stitch densities up to 24,900/M2, our high-resilience turf is specifically built to withstand constant, heavy foot traffic in cafes, schools, event spaces, and public parks.

installation: Our premium turf can be seamlessly installed on both hard surfaces and natural soil. For concrete or tiled balconies, the grass is rolled out, precision-cut, and secured using heavy-duty double-sided turf tape or specialized all-weather synthetic grass adhesive. For outdoor soil landscaping, the ground is first leveled and compacted with a base of crushed stone dust for optimal drainage, and the turf is firmly secured using galvanized steel U-pins along the perimeter.
maintenance: Designed for maximum convenience with near-zero maintenance. For indoor or balcony use, a standard vacuum cleaner or a stiff-bristled broom easily removes dry leaves and dust. For outdoor garden areas, an occasional rinse with a garden hose keeps it looking fresh. Solid pet waste can be picked up normally, and the area can be quickly washed with a mild, eco-friendly soapy water solution to prevent any odors.

faqs.question: Do you supply artificial grass for large commercial projects in Gurugram and Delhi NCR?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a premier B2B supplier of synthetic turf across the NCR region. We provide full 539 sq. ft. commercial rolls at direct wholesale prices to architects, landscapers, builders, and interior designers.

faqs.question: Will the color of the artificial grass fade in the extreme summer heat of Delhi?
faqs.answer: No. Our premium grass range is manufactured using top-tier UV stabilizers. This specialized engineering ensures the turf retains its vibrant, natural green color and structural integrity even after years of direct exposure to harsh sunlight.

faqs.question: How does the grass handle heavy monsoon rains? Will water pool on my balcony?
faqs.answer: Water pooling is not an issue. Our turf features a highly efficient Max-Drain double-layered backing with strategically punched drainage holes. Rainwater passes straight through and flows seamlessly to your balcony or garden's natural drainage outlet.

faqs.question: Which pile height (thickness) is best for my specific project?
faqs.answer: The 25mm variant is excellent for budget-friendly balconies and high-traffic commercial zones. The 35mm and 40mm options are our bestsellers, offering a highly realistic look for residential lawns and terraces. The 50mm variant is our ultra-luxury turf, providing a dense, plush, and cushion-like feel for premium spaces.

faqs.question: Is your synthetic turf safe for dogs, cats, and other pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our grass is 100% non-toxic, lead-free, and incredibly durable, meaning dogs cannot dig through it. Liquid waste drains instantly through the backing, while solid waste is easily scooped up. A quick rinse with water and mild soap keeps the area hygienic and odor-free.

faqs.question: Can I install artificial grass directly on top of normal soil or mud?
faqs.answer: Direct installation on loose mud is not recommended. For a long-lasting finish, the topsoil must be cleared and leveled. A compacted sub-base of crushed stone dust or gravel is then applied to ensure proper drainage and a perfectly even surface before the grass is laid and pinned.

faqs.question: Is it safe to place heavy patio furniture or planters on the artificial grass?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our high-density yarn (featuring up to 24,900 stitches/m2) is exceptionally resilient and designed to support heavy weights. While the blades may flatten slightly under heavy furniture legs over time, vigorously brushing them against the grain with a stiff broom will restore their upright position.

faqs.question: Does artificial grass get uncomfortably hot during the summer?
faqs.answer: Like any synthetic outdoor surface, artificial turf will absorb ambient heat under direct, intense afternoon sun. However, it cools down very rapidly once shaded. On extremely hot days, lightly misting the grass with a hose immediately cools the surface for comfortable use.

faqs.question: What is the expected lifespan of Goals Floors premium artificial grass?
faqs.answer: With standard residential usage and correct professional installation, our premium synthetic turf is engineered to last anywhere from 8 to 12 years while maintaining its lush, vibrant appearance. It also comes backed by a comprehensive UV protection warranty.

faqs.question: Do I have to purchase a full roll, or can I buy customized cut sizes?
faqs.answer: While our primary focus is bulk B2B roll supplies (539 sq. ft. per roll), we absolutely cater to residential projects by offering custom cut sizes (sold by running feet) for balconies and small terraces. Please share your exact dimensions with our team for a precise quote.

faqs.question: What is the price of artificial grass in Gurgaon?
faqs.answer: Artificial grass price starts from ₹45/sq.ft and goes up depending on thickness, density, and quality.

faqs.question: Which artificial grass is best for balconies?
faqs.answer: 35mm and 40mm artificial grass are the most popular choices for balconies and terrace gardens because they provide a natural look and soft feel.

faqs.question: Can artificial grass be installed on tiles?
faqs.answer: Yes, artificial grass can be directly installed on tiles, concrete, balconies, and terrace floors using adhesive or turf tape.

installationSteps.title: Base Preparation
points: Clear all existing debris, stones, and weeds from the area
Create a perfectly level sub-base using compacted crushed stone dust (for soil)
Ensure a minimum 2% slope towards the outlet for optimal water drainage (for concrete/tiles)

installationSteps.title: Weed Barrier & Comfort Foam
points: Lay down a high-quality weed suppression geotextile fabric (for soil installations)
Install a layer of shock-absorbing comfort foam padding if a softer feel is required (for balconies)

installationSteps.title: Layout, Acclimation & Precision Trim
points: Roll out the artificial grass, ensuring the pile (blades) all face the same optimal viewing direction
Allow the turf to rest in the sun for 1-2 hours to uncrease and acclimate
Carefully trim the excess edges along the perimeter using a sharp utility knife

installationSteps.title: Seaming & Secure Fastening
points: Seamlessly join multiple rolls together using heavy-duty fiberglass seaming tape and specialized turf adhesive
Firmly secure the outer edges using galvanized steel U-pins (for soil) or perimeter glue (for hard surfaces)

installationSteps.title: Infill Application & Final Power Brushing
points: Evenly spread a calculated layer of fine silica sand infill to weigh down the turf and keep blades upright (optional for heavy traffic)
Use a stiff-bristled broom or a power brush machine against the grain to make all the grass fibers stand up perfectly straight
